LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER GIOVANNI NOCERINO'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD [C.C.P. SEC. 1285] IS GRANTED AS TO RESPONDENT MEDIA LARIO USA INC. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. PETITIONER'S COUNSEL INFORMS THE COURT THAT ONLY ONE OF TWO RESPONDENTS WAS SERVED. WRITTEN ORDER AND JUDGMENT AS TO RESPONDENT, MEDIA LARIO USA INC. ARE SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: SHERRY L. SAWYER, CSR #59761, EMAIL: SSAWYER@SFTC.ORG. (D302)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award [C.C.P. Sec. 1285]
Off Calendar Sep-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Richard E. Levine of Levine and Baker (415-391-8177) appears as counsel for petitioner

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

PETITIONER GIOVANNI NOCERINO'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award [C.C.P. Sec. 1285] is granted as to respondent Media Lario USA Inc. No opposition was filed. Petitioner's counsel informs the Court that only one of two respondents was served. Written order and judgment as to respondent, Media Lario USA Inc. are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #59761, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
